<<Force and Motion>>

The sailboat moves with a force from the wind. The formula calculates the force on the sail. The speed of the boat affects the force applied.  
* * *  
The wind speed is a constant value. The boat's speed changes over time. The power reaches maximum at a specific point.  
* * *  
The formula includes the sail area. The wind speed is given as 6.3 m/s. The boat's speed is the unknown variable.
